channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo monthly.

👤 Owner: hypery11

📝 Repository: hypery11/flipper-tesla-fsd

📄 Descrizione: Tesla Mod — Flipper Zero & ESP32. Nag killer, FSD region unlock, track mode, BMS dashboard, blind spot alert, high beam strobe, speed display, steering mode + more. Works via OBD-II or X179 connector.

🍴 Forks: 319

💻 Linguaggio: C

item.title: 📝 quantumaikr/quant.cpp (383 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: quantumaikr

📝 Repository: quantumaikr/quant.cpp

📄 Descrizione: LLM inference with 7x longer context. Pure C, zero dependencies. Lossless KV cache compression + single-header library.

⭐ Stelle: 383

🍴 Forks: 41

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: delta-compression embeddable gguf kv-cache llm llm-inference pure-c quantization transformer turboquant

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-19T12:15:13Z
